metadata.name: ci-guided-guardrails
metadata.description: Allow the guided CI path on sandbox hosts during staffed hours and make production attack attempts an explicit deny.

rules.description: Never let CI launch crawl or attack tools against production hosts.
rules.reason: Production hosts stay outside the autonomous CI attack path.

rules.description: Permit target-bearing guided import, crawl, attack, findings, and report generation for sandbox hosts during staffed hours.
rules.reason: Sandbox CI is approved during staffed rollout hours.

rules.description: Permit guided lifecycle checks and workspace-confined report readback that do not carry a target parameter.
rules.reason: Guided follow-up calls are approved during staffed rollout hours; report readback is bounded by report/workspace artifact confinement, not host matching.

rules.description: Allow CI clients to discover the approved tool surface before execution.
rules.reason: MCP clients need tool discovery before selecting the approved guided path.
